title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Axis Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Axis Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
